name: brrain
description: The user's second brain (brrain): the full park-and-link knowledge loop. setup creates or connects a brain per device; remember captures provenance-tagged notes; refine synthesizes the inbox into canonical wiki pages at the trust gate; recall reads them back; interview hunts knowledge gaps and elicits answers to fill them; audit lints the canonical pages for inconsistency.

interface.shortDescription: Your durable, git-backed second brain: capture, synthesize, recall.
interface.longDescription: brrain is a portable second-brain engine over a local-first, plain-markdown knowledge base. Capture notes (remember), synthesize them into canonical cross-linked wiki pages behind a trust gate (refine), read them back (recall), and keep the corpus growing and consistent (interview, audit). setup creates or connects a brain per device.
